task: Estimate the prevalence and identify risk factors of non-alcoholic fatty liver disease (NAFLD) in U.S. adults using NHANES 2011-2018 data across four survey cycles. The analysis should: (1) define NAFLD using the US Fatty Liver Index (USFLI ≥ 30) in the absence of other causes of chronic liver disease (excessive alcohol intake, chronic hepatitis B, chronic hepatitis C); (2) estimate national NAFLD prevalence using survey-weighted analysis, overall and stratified by demographic subgroups (age, sex, race/ethnicity, BMI category, diabetes status); (3) assess the prevalence of advanced fibrosis among NAFLD-positive individuals using the NAFLD fibrosis score (NFS) and fibrosis-4 index (FIB-4) with established clinical cutoffs; (4) identify independent risk factors for NAFLD using survey-weighted multivariable logistic regression with adjustment for demographic, metabolic, and lifestyle covariates; (5) examine temporal trends in NAFLD prevalence across the four NHANES cycles (2011-2012, 2013-2014, 2015-2016, 2017-2018); (6) evaluate the burden of NAFLD with concurrent advanced fibrosis by subgroup. The study population includes non-pregnant adults aged ≥20 years with complete data for USFLI calculation and liver disease exclusion criteria. All analyses must account for the complex survey design of NHANES.

data.name: NHANES 2011-2018 Demographics
data.description: Demographic variables including age, sex, race/ethnicity, education, and income from four NHANES cycles (2011-2012, 2013-2014, 2015-2016, 2017-2018).

data.name: NHANES 2011-2018 Liver Function Tests
data.description: Standard biochemistry panel including ALT, AST, GGT, alkaline phosphatase, total bilirubin, albumin, and platelet count. Required for USFLI calculation, NFS, and FIB-4.

data.name: NHANES 2011-2018 Metabolic Panel
data.description: Fasting glucose, insulin, HbA1c, total cholesterol, HDL, triglycerides. Required for metabolic risk factor assessment.

data.name: NHANES 2011-2018 Body Measures
data.description: BMI, waist circumference, body weight, and height from examination component. Required for USFLI calculation and obesity classification.

data.name: NHANES 2011-2018 Hepatitis Serology
data.description: Hepatitis B surface antigen (HBsAg) and hepatitis C antibody (anti-HCV) status. Required for excluding viral hepatitis from NAFLD definition.

data.name: NHANES 2011-2018 Alcohol Use
data.description: Alcohol consumption patterns from questionnaire data. Required for excluding excessive alcohol intake from NAFLD definition.

data.name: Variable Codebook
data.description: Complete variable definitions, value labels, and survey design notes for all NHANES 2011-2018 components used in this analysis.
